title: Perspective
description: Change the perspective of your player without moving!
body:
# Perspective
A mod that allows you to rotate the camera around the player without moving!

Original code from [Celibistrial's code (freelook)](https://github.com/Celibistrial/freelook). This mod allows you to hold and toggle at the same time at your discretion!

This is based on Lunar Client's idea of freelook, so have a look!

NOTICE: This mod DOES NOT allow your camera to clip through opaque blocks.
